"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-401", "name": "Missing Release of Memory after Effective Lifetime"}], "description": "### Impact
The original report:

> Server handling of 100-Continue requests can lead to memory leak that can be abused to cause a Denial of Service state.

After investigation, turns out that every request that has a body, but reading the body may end up in reading 0 bytes, leaks a buffer.
This is particularly the case for 100-Continue, but any request where the network is slow can leak.

### Affected Versions

* Jetty 11.0.0-11.0.22 (EOL)
* Jetty 10.0.0-10.0.22 (EOL)

### Patched Versions

* Jetty 11.0.23
* Jetty 10.0.23

### Patches

https://github.com/jetty/jetty.project/pull/12156

### Workarounds

No workarounds.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00252, "percentile": 0.1659}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9299-c6m4-mjhc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T22:58:29Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9299-c6m4-mjhc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9299-c6m4-mjhc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2024-7708"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-07-14T09:16:39Z", "published_at": "2026-07-22T22:58:29Z", "references": ["https://github.com/jetty/jetty.project/security/advisories/GHSA-9299-c6m4-mjhc", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-7708", "https://github.com/jetty/jetty.project/pull/12156", "https://github.com/jetty/jetty.project/commit/8259eabbc70ae7fc2d525f1e95b43fbdfd2ad097", "https://github.com/jetty/jetty.project/releases/tag/jetty-10.0.23", "https://github.com/jetty/jetty.project/releases/tag/jetty-11.0.23", "https://gitlab.eclipse.org/security/cve-assignment/-/work_items/29", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9299-c6m4-mjhc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/jetty/jetty.project/security-advisories/GHSA-9299-c6m4-mjhc", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/jetty/jetty.project", "summary": "Eclipse Jetty: DoS attack triggering OutOfMemory with 100-Continue requests", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T22:58:31Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9299-c6m4-mjhc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "10.0.23", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.eclipse.jetty:jetty-server"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 10.0.7, < 10.0.23"}, {"first_patched_version": "11.0.23", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.eclipse.jetty:jetty-server"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 11.0.7, < 11.0.23"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Eclipse Jetty: DoS attack triggering OutOfMemory with 100-Continue requests
